introSection: Seifenkiste (English: Soapbox) is a kiddie roller coaster in storage at Trampolino Familien- und Freizeitpark in Andernach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Seifenkiste (English: Soapbox) is a kiddie roller coaster in storage at Trampolino Familien- und Freizeitpark in Andernach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
